title: Why every course review starts with what's working
excerpt: A course quality review is feedback, and feedback lands differently depending on where it starts. Here's why strengths come first, every time.

title: Where to begin with digital accessibility
excerpt: Two real starting points for getting into accessibility, depending on whether you want a fast practical foothold or a thorough credentialed understanding.

title: Instructional design is project management, whether the title says so or not
excerpt: Course development moves through more stakeholders than any single model accounts for. Why CAPM, and eventually PMP, are worth a real look for instructional designers.
